subcodes.first_line: We ask of Our knowledge and say, with knowledge surpassing My knowledge: teach Me and make Me to know—do the outpourings of the ocean of Thy utterance influence mankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نسئل علمنا و نقول باعلمی علمنی و عرفنی هل توثر فی الناس رشحات بحر بیانک
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
